label: Human
description: Pause execution and wait for a human to submit a form. Uses the await_form language primitive. Form fields determine the visible inputs/outputs via form_field_specs.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Title
inputs.description: Title the reviewer sees at the top of the form.

inputs.name: description
inputs.label: Description
inputs.placeholder: What you want the reviewer to do.

inputs.name: fields
inputs.label: Form fields
inputs.description: Each field contributes inputs/outputs per its fieldType (see form_field_specs).

then.message: HumanQuery '{id}' has no form fields; the human would see an empty form.
